rationale: Educ. Code §29.185 governs career and technology education program requirements. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts, so no conflict arises.
quote: Sec. 29.185. CAREER AND TECHNOLOGY PROGRAM REQUIREMENTS AND PROCEDURES. (a) The agency shall prescribe requirements for career and technology education in public schools as necessary to comply with federal law.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
